sentence: go to news.ycombinator.com, go to page 2 of the listings, and open the top story there

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Hacker News Homepage
workflow.description: Locate and click the 'more' link to navigate to the next page of listings.
triggers: If the current URL contains news.ycombinator.com
If a link with text 'more' is visible

workflow.name: On Page 2 of Listings
workflow.description: Identify the top story on page 2 and click its link.
triggers: If the current URL contains news.ycombinator.com/news?p=2
If a link with text 'more' is visible
actions: Click the first link with class 'titlelink'

workflow.name: Story Page Opened
workflow.description: Confirm that the top story from page 2 has been successfully opened.
triggers: If the current URL does NOT contain news.ycombinator.com/news
If the page title does NOT contain 'Hacker News'
actions: Terminate: Top story from page 2 opened
